title: SmeltedOres
description: Smelts ores that are mined instead of you having to smelt them
body:
# SmeltedOres

## Overview
SmeltedOres revolutionizes the mining experience in Minecraft by instantly providing processed materials when breaking blocks. No more time wasted at furnaces - mine any configured block and receive its processed version directly!

## Key Features

### Fully Customizable Mappings
Server owners can configure any block-to-item conversion they desire:
- Traditional ore conversions (Iron Ore → Iron Ingot)
- Stone variants (Cobblestone → Stone)
- Nether materials (Netherrack → Nether Brick)
- Sand to Glass, Clay to Bricks, and more!

### Custom Drop Quantities
Configure how many items each block should produce:
- Set copper ore to drop 3 ingots instead of 1
- Increase valuable ore yields for custom economy balance
- Create scarcity or abundance based on server needs

### Player Control
Players can easily toggle the functionality on and off with simple commands:
- `/smeltedores` - Toggle auto-smelting
- `/smeltedores on` - Enable auto-smelting
- `/smeltedores off` - Disable auto-smelting
- `/smeltedores status` - Check your current setting

### Fortune Support
The plugin intelligently integrates with Fortune enchantments:
- Fortune enchantment increases yields of processed materials
- Configurable Fortune multiplier for fine-tuned balance
- Maintain vanilla gameplay mechanics while enhancing the experience

### Admin Commands
Server administrators gain access to additional functionality:
- `/smeltedores list` - View all configured block conversions
- `/smeltedores reload` - Update configuration without server restart

### Configuration Options
Extensive configuration file with options for:
- Default enabled/disabled status
- Permission requirements
- Fortune enchantment settings
- Experience drop controls
- Global drop multipliers
- Custom mapping definitions

## Benefits

### Enhanced Server Experience
Create a unique gameplay experience tailored to your server's theme or economy. Whether you want a vanilla+ experience with simple ore smelting or a complete overhaul of resource gathering, this plugin is infinitely adaptable.

### Resource Management
Reduce coal consumption by skipping traditional smelting processes. Make your server more environmentally friendly while streamlining the player experience.

### Time Efficiency
Players spend more time exploring, building, and engaging with your server's content instead of waiting at furnaces for materials to process.

### Server Performance
By eliminating furnace operations, the plugin reduces overall server load from furnace tick updates and fuel consumption mechanics.

## Why Choose This Plugin?

This lightweight yet powerful solution transforms resource gathering without disrupting game balance. The extensive customization options make it perfect for any server type - from survival to economy to custom adventure modes.

With its intuitive command system and comprehensive configuration, server owners can create a truly unique experience that players won't find anywhere else. The toggle functionality ensures players can choose their preferred playstyle, whether that's traditional processing or the enhanced auto-conversion experience.
